titles.romaji: Wagahai wa Inu de Aru: Don Matsugoro no Seikatsu
titles.native: 吾輩は犬である ドン松五郎の生活
synonyms: Wagahai wa Inu de Aru: Don Matsugoro no Monogatari
I Am A Dog: The Story of Don Matsugoro
I Am A Dog: Don Matsugorou's Life
titles.tmdb_title: I Am A Dog: Don Matsugorou's Life

description: The special revolves around a talking dog named Don Matsugorou and his family. Mr. Matsuzawa is a novelist who lives in Chiba Prefecture. Only his daughter Kazuko knows that the family dog, Don Matsugorou, can talk. Don is wounded in a fight with the neighbors' dog, King, a nouveau-riche mongrel with ideas above his station. In addition to this, Don Matsugorou must save Chotaro, a fellow dog who gets kidnapped, and might even find love in another dog, Ogin, along the way.
